title: Refactor string_prefix_regex into binary pattern matching
prompt: Refactor both functions in test_fixtures/string_prefix_regex.ex (`parse/1` and `extract_prefix/1`) to use binary pattern matching in function heads. Do not use `String.starts_with?/2`, `String.slice/3`, or `Regex.run/2`. Each function should have one clause per prefix + a catch-all. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.CommandParser do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Two functions to rewrite, plus the PING case requires handling trailing whitespace correctly.
